# Muxy Documentation

> Promote gaming viewer engagement with Twitch Extensions using real-time data handling and communication tools

## Guides
- [Quick Start for Developers](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/quick-start.md): These guides will help you get started with Muxy. You'll be up and running in a jiffy!
- [Get Started with MEDKit](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/getting-started-with-medkit.md): Introduction to MEDKit and the Muxy SDK
- [Build a Simple Extension](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/build-a-simple-extension.md): Add source for a Hello World extension to your basic installation
- [Create a viewer panel](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/create-a-viewer-panel.md)
- [Create a broadcaster panel](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/create-a-broadcaster-panel.md)
- [Basic Muxy Login Workflow](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/basic-muxy-login-workflow.md)
- [Install Manually](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/install-manually.md): Use npm and webpack to install and configure MEDKit
- [Developing with MEDKit](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/developing-with-medkit.md): Set up your development environment and learn the basics
- [Set up User Simulation](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/set-up-user-simulation.md): The Muxy debugging system provides user-simulation for testing and debugging in the development environment.
- [Data Tracking](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/data-tracking.md): MEDKit offers three different ways to track any kind of extension and viewer data that you want to use.
- [Store Extension and Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/state-information.md): Muxy lets you define your own state data and maintains it in real time.
- [Store Configuration Data](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/store-configuration-data.md): Muxy provides a storage area for developer-defined configuration data that is specific to either an extension or a channel.
- [Store Arbitrary JSON Data](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/arbitrary-state.md): Define and store your own data values for users to retrieve.
- [Get Viewer Information](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/get-viewer-information.md): Access information about the current viewer, or all users who have shared their information.
- [Call into the Twitch API](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/call-into-the-twitch-api.md)
- [Troubleshooting Tips](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/troubleshooting-tips.md): Some tips for avoiding common problems.
- [Data Aggregation](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/data-aggregation-techniques.md): Build extensions that let streamers and broadcasters interact with viewers.
- [Accumulating User Data](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/accumulation.md)
- [Ranking User Data](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/ranking.md)
- [Viewer Engagement Tools](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/viewer-engagement-tools.md): Build extensions that let streamers and broadcasters interact with viewers.
- [Polls and User Voting](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/voting.md): An broadcaster or administrator can create and manage a named poll, and collect users' votes.
- [Unity GameLink Tutorial](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/unity-gamelink-tutorial.md): This tutorial walks through building a small Unity scene that does GameLink authentication and reacts to a viewer poll.
- [Unity FPS Demo Code Walkthrough](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/unity-fps-demo-code-walkthrough.md): Download and walk through an example project that demonstrates important functionality.
- [Unity Gateway Tutorial](https://docs.muxy.io/docs/unity-gateway-tutorial.md)

## API Reference
- [Using the MEDKit REST API](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/medkit-rest-api.md): Overview of available functionality.
- [Developing in the Sandbox](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/dev-auth.md): Muxy provides an off-Twitch environment for development and testing.
- [Authorization for Testing](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/try-sandbox-auth.md): Returns one or more JSON Web Tokens (JWT) for use in the sandbox environment.
- [Config API](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/config-api.md): Muxy provides a storage area for developer-defined configuration data that is specific to either an extension or a channel.
- [All Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-config.md)
- [Extension Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-config-1.md)
- [Extension Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-config-2.md)
- [Extension Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-config-3.md)
- [Channel Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/channel-config.md)
- [Channel Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/channel-config-1.md)
- [Channel Config](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/channel-config-2.md)
- [State API](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/rest-state-api.md): Use these endpoints to define and manage developer-defined game state.
- [All State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/viewer-state.md)
- [Extension State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/viewer-state-4.md)
- [Extension State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-state.md)
- [Extension State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-state-1.md)
- [Channel State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/channel-state.md)
- [Channel State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/channel-state-1.md)
- [Channel State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/channel-state-2.md)
- [Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/viewer-state-2.md)
- [Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/viewer-state-1.md)
- [Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/viewer-state-3.md)
- [Extension Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-viewer-state.md)
- [Extension Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-viewer-state-1.md)
- [Extension Viewer State](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-viewer-state-2.md)
- [Engagement Tools API](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/aggregation-api.md): Use these tools to encourage viewer  engagement with interactive events and rewards.
- [Basic Accumulation](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/accumulate.md): Basic accumulation allows you to collect large amounts of user input into a list for consumption by a backend.
- [Accumulate](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/accumulate-1.md)
- [Accumulate](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/accumulate-2.md)
- [Basic Ranking](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/rank.md): The REST API provides a ranking service that collects user input and counts matching values.
- [Rank](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/rank-1.md)
- [Rank](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/rank-2.md)
- [Rank](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/rank-3.md)
- [Poll Management](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/poll-managment.md): The voting endpoints allow for high-volume polling activity.
- [Communication API](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/communication-api.md): The MEDKit API offers administrative services for back-end communication among extensions.
- [Broadcast Messaging](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/broadcast.md): The broadcast service enables a broadcaster or admin to define and publish messages to subscribers.
- [Using the WebSocket Protocol](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/websocket-protocol.md): The GameLink connection provides a persistent, publish-subscribe connection for data flow between game clients or servers and a massive live streaming audience.
- [Authentication](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/ws-authentication.md): The WebSocket protocol supports authorization using PIN or JWT.
- [Client-Server Communication](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/ws-pubsub.md)
- [Storing State on the Server](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/ws-state-access.md): The WebSocket protocol supports read and write of developer-defined game state values.
- [Polling](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/ws-polling.md): A game client can create and update audience polls, and receive real-time updates on voting results using the `poll` topic.
- [Purchase Transactions](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/ws-purchase-transactions.md): Twitch notifies you when users purchase products that you offer. Listening for these events lets you implement a fulfillment process.
- [Muxy GameLink Library](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/gamelink-library.md): Use this native-code library to integrate Muxy functionality into your game or other Twitch extension.
- [SDK Class](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/sdk-class.md): Provides primary access to Muxy functionality.
- [Extension Setup API](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/extension-setup-api.md): These functions handle authentication and set up general server communication.
- [State and Configuration Handling](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/state-config-fns.md): SDK functions that access Muxy Twitch Extension state and configuration data.
- [Event Handling](https://docs.muxy.io/reference/event-handling.md): SDK functions for managing subscriptions and handling of event notification in all areas.

## Changelog
- [GameLink Release](https://docs.muxy.io/changelog/gamelink-release.md)
